entry.title: Move selection screen parameters data to my table fields
entry.content:
Dear SAP users,

I have a question, I want to copy the values of fields in ly selection-screen to the fields of my custom table.

For the selection screen, I have 

PARAMETERS: p_bukrs like T001-BUKRS OBLIGATORY . 

SELECT-OPTIONS: so_budat FOR ACDOCA-BUDAT OBLIGATORY.

And I have a custom table with fields:

COMPANY_CODE DATA ELEMENT BUKRS

DATE_HIGH DATA ELEMENT DATE

DATE_LOW DATA ELEMENT DATE

Now I want to copy the data of selection screen like this:

COMPANY_CODE =  p_bukrs 

DATE_HIGH = so_budat-high 

DATE_LOW = so_budat-low

I wrote some code, I did a point debug and I found that it come with data for p_bukrs, so_budat-high andso_budat-low but when it come to sy-subrc it give me 4

FORM move_data.
  LOOP AT gt_alv INTO DATA(ls_alv).
    DATA: gt_alv8 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ztfi_affec_a,
          gs_alv8 TYPE ztfi_affec_a.

    SELECT * FROM ztfi_affec_a INTO TABLE gt_alv8
      WHERE company_code = p_bukrs
        AND date_low >= so_budat-low
        AND date_high <= so_budat-high.

    LOOP AT gt_alv8 INTO gs_alv8.
      gs_alv8-date_high    = so_budat-high.
      gs_alv8-date_low     = so_budat-low.
      gs_alv8-company_code = p_bukrs.
         IF sy-subrc = 0.
           ENDIF.

      SELECT SINGLE * FROM ztfi_affec_a INTO @DATA(ls_exist)
        WHERE company_code = @GS_alv8-company_code
         AND date_high = @GS_alv8-date_high
          AND date_low = @GS_alv8-date_low.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        UPDATE ztfi_affec_a FROM gs_alv8.
      ELSE.
        INSERT ztfi_affec_a FROM gs_alv8.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: Re: Embed custom BTP workzone UI5 app in S/4HANA public c...
entry.content:
Hello @Mehh 

Embedding BTP Workzone App in S/4HANA Public Cloud

Directly embedding a BTP Workzone UI5 app inside the S/4HANA Public Cloud Fiori Launchpad without a redirect is not possible.

What you can do:

  • Create a Custom Tile in S/4HANA Cloud pointing to the app’s URL.
  • This works if the app is deployed as a standalone UI5 app on the BTP HTML5 Repository, not strictly tied to Workzone.
  • The user is still redirected, but Workzone itself isn’t needed for hosting one app.

Conclusion: No seamless in-app embedding; only tile redirection is supported. For minimal setup, deploy to the BTP HTML5 Repo and link via Fiori Launchpad.

SAP Help – Custom Tile in S/4HANA Public Cloud

SAP Help – Deploy UI5 Apps to BTP HTML5 Repository

Wirg regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Propogate a freshly calculated product cost as materi...
entry.content:
Dear @ArpitPorwal26,

there is no hierarchical relation between product and material when using the standard IFP business content and that's why the prices for semi-finished goods are not adjusted as you expect.

We recommend to load the cost estimate as exploded BOM, in this way, all products are broken down into their raw materials. When changing the price for the raw material this is then reflected in all products consuming this raw material. 
Otherwise you would need to calculate the product prices with several steps, which might get very complex depending on your product structure.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Good Issue check upon Shipment Completion
entry.content:
Hi Sir,

Thank you for your advice. I understand that the configuration you mentioned is intended to enable automatic PGI upon shipment completion. However,  we currently have a weighbridge interface in place that performs auto PGI at the Delivery Order level.

If we were to shift the auto PGI trigger to shipment completion, it would require changes to our existing interface logic.

The issue we are currently facing is that some Delivery Orders that are not yet PGI,  yet the system allows shipment completion and proceeds to create shipment costs and accruals. This typically occurs when multiple DOs are linked to a single shipment, and users forgot to remove the open DO during shipment completion.

Given this, I would like to ask: similar to the picking check available in the "Define Shipment Type" configuration, is there any standard control available to check PGI status during shipment completion—without requiring enhancements via user exits?

Your insights on this would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Zaida Ishak

entry.title: Re: How to reset TMSADM user password
entry.content:
To do the process manually, you will need to reset the PW of the users on all 000 clients of all ECC systems and then update the RFC connections (SM59). The TMS connections have this type of name TMSADM@... and TMSSUP@...

You need to have no one operating the STMS during the process, otherwise the users will be locked.

entry.title: Re: SAP PLC Appliance Demo System - Configuration Problems
entry.content:
Hi Serge,

I hope this message finds you well! 🙂

If your query is still of interest, the issue most likely is from the untrusted HTTPS certificate of the machine. The process to have a trusted connection is described in the "Getting Started" guide.

We recently released the SP8 of the Product Lifecycle Costing Appliance, which makes the process easier. It is also described in the "Getting Started" guide. Let me know if you still have issues with this and we can quickly connect to solve your issue. 

PS: Regarding the config file, we assure you that it has all the information you need in order to use the backend. Yes, you can configure additional entries, as the one you highlighted, but they are not required for the initial login.

Best Regards,

Alex Baluta

entry.title: Re: Miss match in catalogs and apps between starter and D...
entry.content:
Hello @Inchara_BK 

Thank you for raising this. The difference you noticed is expected in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (3SL setup):

  • The Starter System contains extra demo apps and catalogues for workshops.
  • The Development System only shows apps linked to activated scope items and assigned business roles.

If apps are visible in the IAM Information System but not usable, it usually means that the catalogue or role assignments are missing.

Next Steps:

  • Check activated scope items in Manage Your Solution.
  • Regenerate and assign role templates if needed.
  • Some demo apps are not intended for productive use.

Reference:
Role and Catalogue Setup – SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

SAP Help – S/4HANA Public Cloud Extensibility & Role Management

With best regards

Chuma
